dashboard.title: Dashboard

dashboard.empty: No transactions yet for this month.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every entry in one place
transactions.loadError: We couldn't load your transactions right now.

import.title: Import transactions
import.description: Drop in a bank export, receipt, statement, or photo. Exact CSV and JSON files map directly. Everything else gets parsed through Gemini and queued for review.
import.emptyState: Drop a file here or choose one from your device.
import.directHint: Direct import for exact CSV and JSON fields, Gemini for the rest.
import.genericError: We couldn't parse that file right now.
import.emptyDetected: No transactions were detected in that file.
import.stepOneBody: We inspect the file first. Canonical CSV and JSON headers skip AI and stay deterministic.
import.stepTwoBody: Files that need interpretation are converted into a Gemini prompt, with your current categories included for cleaner matching.
import.stepThreeBody: Check the rows, fix anything highlighted, and import when the list looks right. Current warnings: {{count}}.
import.importTip: If your export already uses transaction fields like type, amount, merchant, category, and transactionDate, the importer will keep it on the direct path and skip LLM parsing.
import.fixIssues: Please resolve the highlighted rows before importing.
import.categoryTypeMismatch: Choose a category that matches the transaction type.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Keep the month grounded
budgets.empty: No budget set for this month yet.
budgets.allocationsHint: Adjust your category targets and any remaining budget flows automatically into Other.
budgets.autoAssignedHint: Automatically adjusted to keep the full budget balanced.
budgets.noExpenseCategories: No expense categories are available yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Language, profile, and future hooks
settings.profileSetupHint: Update your name here any time.
settings.budgetDefaultsHint: This split is your saved starting point. Your monthly budget page can still be adjusted separately.
settings.profileSaveError: We couldn't save your profile right now.
settings.premiumTeaser: Premium insights and automation can live here later.

onboarding.error: We couldn't finish setup right now.
onboarding.profileDescription: Start with the basics so the app feels like yours from the first screen.
onboarding.profileHint: You can skip this and we’ll fill in a default name for you.
onboarding.budgetDescription: One number is enough to get you moving. You can always adjust it later.
onboarding.splitDescription: Give each bucket a rough share. Anything left over rolls into Other automatically.
onboarding.readyTitle: A clean starting point for the month.
onboarding.readyDescription: Finish now or skip this step and RWY will save a balanced default split for you.
